data.title: BitGo gets OCC approval to convert trust company to national bank named BitGo Bank & Trust; Now operates as a national bank.
data.description: In New York, BitGo Holdings, Inc. has been authorized by the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) to transition its subsidiary, BitGo Trust Company, Inc., from a state trust company in South Dakota to a national bank named BitGo Bank & Trust, National Association (N.A.). This transformation allows BitGo's Trust Company to function as BitGo Bank & Trust, National Association following the OCC's recent approval. The move signifies a shift to operating at a national level for BitGo.

data.title: UKG to acquire Inova Payroll, a U.S.-based HCM & payroll services provider for SMBs, subject to closing conditions.
data.description: UKG Inc., a prominent global AI platform specializing in HR, pay, and workforce management, has recently finalized a deal to acquire Inova Payroll, a U.S.-based company offering human capital management (HCM) and payroll services to small and mid-sized businesses (SMBs). This agreement is contingent upon standard closing conditions. Through this acquisition, UKG aims to offer innovative outsourced HR assistance and comprehensive benefits brokerage services directly to the SMB market segment.
SOUTHWEST AIRLINES TO OPEN NEW CREW BASE FOR PILOTS AND FLIGHT ATTENDANTS AT AUSTIN BERGSTROM INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT

data.title: Laser by Aleya in Great Neck, NY aligns with clean aesthetic movement with non-invasive laser treatments.
data.description: A New York-based company called Laser by Aleya based in Great Neck, has recently expanded its core services to cater to the increasing interest in clean aesthetics. The company specializes in laser and electrolysis hair removal services. This move comes in response to the growing demand for minimalist beauty trends. The announcement was made on December 12, 2025.

data.title: USPS reveals release of Priority Mail and Priority Mail Express stamps through March 2026. More subjects to come.
data.description: The U.S. Postal Service has disclosed the first-day-of-issue dates and locations for Priority Mail and Priority Mail Express stamps set to be released through March 2026. The announcement was made in Washington on December 12, 2025. The upcoming year will see the release of a variety of stamp subjects, with specific details to be revealed at a later date. The Postal Service's schedule for stamp releases indicates a diverse range of designs and themes for collectors and mail senders to look forward to in the coming years.

data.title: Netmarble reveals new trailer for The Seven Deadly Sins: Origin at Game Awards 2025. Includes multiverse narrative and multiplayer boss battles.
data.description: Netmarble, a prominent game developer and publisher, unveiled a new trailer for its upcoming open-world action RPG, The Seven. The game, set in a multiverse narrative, promises intense multiplayer boss battles in a vast open world. The reveal took place in Seoul, South Korea, on December 12, 2025. This eagerly anticipated game by Netmarble is anticipated to offer players an immersive gaming experience with its unique setting and challenging gameplay elements.

data.title: EMA's CHMP approved Novo Nordisk's high-dose Wegovy 7.2 mg. Application for single-dose device submitted. U.S. and U.K. reviews ongoing. FDA considering rapid review for Eli Lilly.
data.description: Recently, the European Medicines Agency's Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use provided a favorable opinion for Novo Nordisk A/S's higher dosage of Wegovy, semaglutide 7.2 mg. Novo Nordisk has requested approval from the EMA for a new single-dose device to administer Wegovy 7.2 mg. Furthermore, semaglutide 7.2 mg is currently undergoing assessment in the U.S., U.K., and various other nations. This development comes as the FDA considers expediting the review process for Eli Lilly's obesity pill, and Novo Nordisk approaches its product launch. For more details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: FDA may add black box warning to Covid-19 vaccines; experts criticize move as unnecessary.
data.description: The FDA is considering adding a boxed warning, their highest-level safety alert, to Covid-19 vaccines in the U.S. This decision has sparked criticism as outside experts argue there is no evidence to justify this action. The move is part of an internal effort within President Trump's health team to reassess the vaccines, a product seen as a success of his first term. A boxed warning is typically reserved for the most serious risks and is prominently displayed at the top of a medicine's prescribing label. This proposal comes as the FDA broadens its review into the risks of the Covid-19 shot in adults. Similar warnings are currently present on other medications.

data.title: Bitcoin surpasses $94,000 amid Strategy's major investment, as crypto experiences a 'Netscape' moment. Investor caution persists post US rate cut.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin surged to over $94,000 after Strategy made its largest investment since July. However, investor risk tolerance stayed low despite the anticipated US interest rate decrease.

data.title: Pyth to set up reserve with DAO treasury funds, buying PYTH tokens, using 33% of revenue.
data.description: Approximately one-third of the protocol's revenue will be used to purchase the network's native PYTH token for the reserve, in accordance with the DAO.
Copper Retreats From Record as US Technology Stocks Sell Off

data.title: Eli Lilly's new drug showed 38% reduction in risk of progression or death for breast cancer patients in study.
data.description: Eli Lilly and Co. provided updates on the Phase 3 EMBER-3 study of Inluriyo (imlunestrant) for previously treated breast cancer patients. The trial focused on patients with estrogen receptor positive (ER+) and human epidermal growth factor receptor 2–negative (HER2–) advanced or metastatic breast cancer (MBC) who had disease progression on a previous aromatase inhibitor (AI), with or without a CDK4/6 inhibitor. As a standalone treatment, imlunestrant showed a significant 38% decrease in the risk of progression or death (with a median progression-free survival of 5.5 months compared to 3.8 months) and an 11.4-month increase in median overall survival (34.5 months versus 23.1 months) versus endocrine therapy in patients with ESR1. Full article accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AI tool claims to decipher and replicate social video success with optimized remixes. Limited proof beyond demos.
data.description: The startup claims that their artificial intelligence technology can analyze viral videos and produce improved versions, despite the absence of significant proof beyond initial demonstrations.

data.title: HOERBIGER sells Altronic with legal help from Troutman Pepper Locke. Altronic: supplier of power systems.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, Troutman Pepper Locke acted as legal counsel for HOERBIGER, an international technology firm headquartered in Switzerland, during the sale of Altronic. Altronic is a prominent provider of sophisticated ignition, control, and instrumentation solutions for enduring essential infrastructure power assets.

data.title: Rivian and Lucid compete for second place in the robotaxi market. Rivian's AI Day showcased its focus on vertical integration.
data.description: Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) continues to dominate the "Robotaxi King" title with its Cybercab, while Rivian Automotive, Inc. (RIVN) and Lucid Group, Inc. (LCID) are vying for the remaining autonomous market share. RIVN and LCID offer different versions of the robotaxi concept, with RIVN stock showing impressive growth. Rivian showcased its strategic move towards vertical integration during their "Autonomy and AI Day," positioning themselves as strong contenders in the autonomous vehicle race. For more information, visit a reputable financial news website.
Working To Get Common Base Between Ukraine, Europeans, United States In Coming Days

data.title: Ademi Firm is probing DXL (Nasdaq: DXLG) for potential breaches in FullBeauty Brands Inc. deal. Learn more here.
data.description: A firm based in Milwaukee, The Ademi Firm, has initiated an investigation into DXL (listed on Nasdaq as DXLG) for potential breaches of fiduciary duty and other legal violations following the recent deal with FullBeauty Brands Inc. Individuals can click a link to participate in the investigation and receive further details.

data.title: ISHI Health introduces Virtual Heart Failure Clinics in California and Arizona; aims to provide enhanced access to specialist-driven care in those states.
data.description: A company named ISHI Health has introduced Virtual Heart Failure (HF) Clinics in California and Arizona, utilizing AI technology for cardiac care. The program aims to provide access to HF specialist-driven, guideline-aligned care to more people. The launch was announced on December 12, 2025.

data.title: Interactive Brokers now allows retail investors to fund accounts with stablecoins, blurring lines between traditional finance and crypto. This feature is initially for select U.S. customers.
data.description: Interactive Brokers Group Inc, traded on NASDAQ under IBKR, has launched a new feature permitting retail investors to fund their brokerage accounts with stablecoins. This move signifies a blending of traditional finance and crypto, with the initiative starting with eligible U.S. customers. These users can now transfer funds from their crypto wallets, rather than solely depending on bank accounts. Chairman Thomas Peterffy, a billionaire, disclosed this development. To read more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: PNC receives regulatory approvals for acquisition of FirstBank, including its banking operations in Colorado.
data.description: In a recent press release on December 12, 2025, PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. disclosed that they have secured the necessary regulatory clearances to finalize their acquisition of FirstBank Holding Company. This acquisition encompasses all facets of FirstBank Holding Company, notably its banking division. PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol PNC. The completion of this acquisition marks a significant milestone for PNC in expanding its presence and operations. The exact figures and finer details of the acquisition were not disclosed in the press release.
